'''Tef Shabiak''' was the most senior executive, and [[Clone Master/Legends|Clone Master]], at [[Arkanian Microtechnologies]] on the planet [[Vohai]].

==Biography==
After [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] was attacked at the facility by [[Sa Cuis]]'s men, he ordered his aide-de-camp, [[Erv Lekauf]], to remove Shabiak's head to encourage the facility to better its security.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=In His Image|book=Vader: The Ultimate Guide}} {{1st}}
